description: Official metadata-source policy for the 14 priority Find venues. A priority venue cache is reusable only when it satisfies the policy for the effective venue/year; title-only fallbacks are audit-only unless the policy explicitly allows them.

preferred_sources.source: NeurIPS papers.nips.cc yearly proceedings index plus per-paper detail pages
preferred_sources.coverage: accepted proceedings papers; index gives titles/authors/track/PDF and detail pages provide abstracts when public
official virtual paper pages; use as detail enrichment/fallback

openreview_neurips.fallback_policy: Use older released NeurIPS years only when requested-year proceedings are objectively unavailable; never mark a title-only NeurIPS cache complete.

preferred_sources.coverage: accepted submissions with title, abstract, keywords, area/category, decision/presentation metadata

openreview_iclr.fallback_policy: OpenReview is the primary source; DBLP is not an acceptable verified cache for ICLR when OpenReview metadata exists.

preferred_sources.coverage: official accepted papers with virtual detail pages; latest-year source before PMLR proceedings are published
official archival proceedings with abstracts, authors, PDFs and bib metadata after volume release

dblp_icml.fallback_policy: Prefer ICML virtual for current year and PMLR for archival years; ICML downloads/title pages alone are not full metadata.

preferred_sources.source: ACM Digital Library SIGKDD proceedings and official conference accepted-paper pages
preferred_sources.coverage: official ACM proceedings metadata with abstracts/DOIs/PDF landing pages when published

dblp_kdd.fallback_policy: DBLP may seed titles and DOIs but must not be cached as verified full SIGKDD metadata without ACM/official abstracts.

preferred_sources.source: The Web Conference official accepted-paper pages
preferred_sources.coverage: official accepted-paper title, author, track, and paper-code seed; no abstracts are exposed on these pages

preferred_sources.source: ACM Digital Library Web Conference proceedings and official accepted-paper pages
preferred_sources.coverage: official ACM proceedings metadata with abstracts/DOIs/PDF landing pages when published

dblp_www.fallback_policy: DBLP title records are a fallback seed only; full cache requires ACM/official abstracts.

preferred_sources.coverage: official accepted-paper title and track seed; no abstracts are exposed on this page
partial official proceedings mirror with DOI links and inline abstracts for a subset; not a full SIGIR corpus

preferred_sources.source: ACM Digital Library SIGIR proceedings and official accepted-paper pages
preferred_sources.coverage: official ACM proceedings metadata with abstracts/DOIs/PDF landing pages when published

dblp_sigir.fallback_policy: DBLP title records are a fallback seed only; full cache requires ACM/official abstracts.

preferred_sources.coverage: official proceedings HTML with ACM DOI links, authors, sessions and inline abstracts when published

preferred_sources.source: ACM Digital Library CIKM proceedings and official accepted-paper pages
preferred_sources.coverage: official ACM proceedings metadata with abstracts/DOIs/PDF landing pages when published

dblp_cikm.fallback_policy: Prefer the official CIKM proceedings page when it exposes inline abstracts; DBLP title records are a fallback seed only and cannot be verified full metadata without official abstracts.

preferred_sources.source: AAAI official OJS proceedings archive and article pages
preferred_sources.coverage: official proceedings issues with article detail pages, abstracts, authors and PDFs; numbered issue labels are not topical categories

dblp_aaai.fallback_policy: AAAI OJS issue listings must be enriched from article pages before a cache is verified.

preferred_sources.coverage: official CVF paper pages with title, authors, abstract and PDF

dblp_iccv.fallback_policy: CVF list pages are title indexes only; full cache requires each CVF paper detail abstract.

preferred_sources.coverage: official CVF paper pages with title, authors, abstract and PDF

dblp_cvpr.fallback_policy: CVF list pages are title indexes only; full cache requires each CVF paper detail abstract.

preferred_sources.source: ACL Anthology official source XML and paper pages
preferred_sources.coverage: official source records with title, authors, abstract, PDF, DOI and Anthology IDs

dblp_acl.fallback_policy: ACL source XML provides full metadata directly; event-page rows must still be enriched from Anthology paper pages before a cache is verified.

preferred_sources.coverage: official paper detail pages with title, authors, abstract and PDF

dblp_ijcai.fallback_policy: IJCAI index pages are not enough; full cache requires per-paper abstract detail.

preferred_sources.coverage: official ECVA virtual paper pages with detail metadata when available
archival proceedings metadata when volume pages are available

dblp_eccv.fallback_policy: ECVA/Springer detail abstracts are required; ECVA list titles alone are not verified full metadata.

preferred_sources.source: ACL Anthology official EMNLP source XML and paper pages
preferred_sources.coverage: official source records with title, authors, abstract, PDF, DOI and Anthology IDs

dblp_emnlp.fallback_policy: EMNLP source XML provides full metadata directly; event-page rows must still be enriched from Anthology paper pages before a cache is verified.
